name: Lecto AI
description: Lecto AI is a machine translation API providing fast, high-quality text and JSON translation across 90+ languages. Supports automatic language detection, batch text translation, JSON structure-preserving translation with protected keys, and account usage tracking.

capabilities.name: text_translate
capabilities.description: Translate one or more text strings to one or more target languages with optional source language specification.

capabilities.name: json_translate
capabilities.description: Translate a JSON payload preserving its structure, with support for protected keys that skip translation.

capabilities.name: text_detect
capabilities.description: Detect the language of one or more text strings.

capabilities.name: languages_list
capabilities.description: List all supported languages with their codes, names, and source/target support flags.

capabilities.name: account_info
capabilities.description: Retrieve account information including plan details, usage statistics, and subscription status.
